data.name: Message_PluginLoaded
data.value: ACAD KROVY 0.10.0 loaded. The ACAD KROVY tab will be added to the Ribbon. Enter AK_HELP for the command list or AK_TOOLBAR for the classic toolbar with small icons.

data.name: Help_CommandOverview
data.value:
ACAD KROVY 0.10.0
ROOF-FRAMING ELEMENTS AK_KROKVA – quickly assigns the Rafter type AK_POMURNICA – quickly assigns the Wall plate type AK_VAZNICA – quickly assigns the Purlin type AK_STLPIK – quickly assigns the Post type AK_KLIESTINA – quickly assigns the Collar tie type AK_VZPERA – quickly assigns the Brace type AK_VAZNYTRAM – quickly assigns the Tie beam type
DATA AND SCHEDULES AK_ASSIGN – assigns data to selected lines or polylines AK_EDIT – batch-edits the checked values AK_FLIPSLOPE – reverses the slope direction of an element or its annotation AK_INSPECT – displays the data of one element AK_REPORT – inserts a table for selected elements AK_REPORTALL – inserts a table for all elements AK_RECALC – checks the calculations of all elements AK_RIBBON – displays or refreshes the ACAD KROVY Ribbon tab AK_TOOLBAR – displays or hides the classic floating toolbar with small icons AK_SETTINGS – configures layers and colors for each roof-framing element type AK_APPLYLAYERS – applies the current layer settings to the drawing
DRAWING LABELS AK_LABELS – creates or refreshes labels for all roof-framing elements AK_LABELSELECTED – creates or refreshes labels for selected roof-framing elements AK_LABELSHOW – displays the KROV_POPIS layer AK_LABELHIDE – hides the KROV_POPIS layer
Tip: labels refresh automatically after assignment, editing, or geometry changes. Use AK_LABELS and AK_RECALC for a manual check.

data.name: Command_Ribbon_Ready
data.value: ACAD KROVY: the Ribbon tab is ready.

data.name: Command_Ribbon_Pending
data.value: ACAD KROVY: the Ribbon is not ready yet; the tab will be added shortly.

data.name: Command_Toolbar_Shown
data.value: ACAD KROVY: the classic icon toolbar is visible.

data.name: Command_Toolbar_Hidden
data.value: ACAD KROVY: the classic icon toolbar is hidden.

data.name: Command_Settings_SaveFailedFormat
data.value: ACAD KROVY: settings could not be saved: {0}

data.name: Command_Settings_PromptApplyAllowances
data.value: Select the elements to which you want to apply the new cutting allowances:

data.name: Command_Settings_SelectionCancelled
data.value: ACAD KROVY: selection was cancelled; existing elements were not changed.

data.name: Command_Labels_PromptSelected
data.value: Select the elements whose labels you want to create or refresh:

data.name: Command_Labels_UpdatedFormat
data.value: ACAD KROVY: labels refreshed: {0}. New: {1}. Skipped: {2}.

data.name: Command_Labels_RefreshFailedFormat
data.value: The label for element {0} was not created or refreshed: {1}

data.name: Command_Edit_Prompt
data.value: Select smart roof-framing elements to edit:

data.name: Command_Edit_NoData
data.value: The selected object has no ACAD KROVY data. Use AK_ASSIGN or an element-type icon first.

data.name: Command_FlipSlope_Prompt
data.value: Select a timber element or its slope annotation to reverse the direction:

data.name: Command_FlipSlope_NotTimberOrAnnotation
data.value: ACAD KROVY: the selected object is neither a timber element nor its slope annotation.

data.name: Command_FlipSlope_Horizontal
data.value: ACAD KROVY: a horizontal element has no slope direction.

data.name: Command_FlipSlope_PostPerpendicular
data.value: ACAD KROVY: a Post's slope direction is not changed; its annotation remains 90°.

data.name: Command_FlipSlope_ResultReversed
data.value: ACAD KROVY: the slope direction was reversed.

data.name: Command_FlipSlope_ResultNormal
data.value: ACAD KROVY: the slope direction was set to normal.

data.name: Command_Inspect_NoData
data.value: This object has no ACAD KROVY data.

data.name: Command_Inspect_SummaryFormat
data.value: {0} | {1} Cross-section: {2:0} × {3:0} mm Plan length: {4:0.###} m Actual length: {5:0.###} m Cutting length: {6:0.###} m Volume: {7:0.0000} m³

data.name: Command_Inspect_FootprintSummaryFormat
data.value: {0} | {1} Cross-section: {2:0} × {3:0} mm Actual length: {4:0.###} m Cutting length: {5:0.###} m Volume: {6:0.0000} m³

data.name: Command_Report_NoneFound
data.value: No ACAD KROVY elements were found.

data.name: Command_Report_NoValidElements
data.value: The selection contains no valid ACAD KROVY elements.

data.name: Command_Report_InsertedFormat
data.value: ACAD KROVY: schedule inserted for {0} elements. Skipped: {1}. Volume: {2:0.0000} m³.

data.name: Command_Recalc_ResultFormat
data.value: ACAD KROVY: elements recalculated: {0}, errors: {1}. Labels refreshed: {2}. Skipped: {3}.

data.name: Command_Assign_Prompt
data.value: Select lines or polylines to which you want to assign data:

data.name: Command_Assign_PromptTypeFormat
data.value: Select lines or polylines for element {0}:

data.name: Command_Assign_ResultFormat
data.value: ACAD KROVY: data assigned to {0} elements. Skipped: {1}.

data.name: Command_PostFootprint_EdgePrompt
data.value: Select one edge of the Post footprint:

data.name: Command_PostFootprint_PolylineOnly
data.value: Only a lightweight Polyline can be selected.

data.name: Command_PostFootprint_InvalidGeometry
data.value: The polyline must be a closed rectangle with four straight, non-arc edges in the plan plane.

data.name: Command_PostFootprint_AmbiguousPick
data.value: The edge selection is ambiguous near the corner. Click farther from the corner.

data.name: Command_PostFootprint_PickTooFar
data.value: The click is too far from a rectangle edge. Select the edge again.

data.name: Command_PostFootprint_AssignRedirect
data.value: For a Post, select one edge of a rectangular polyline.

data.name: Command_PostFootprint_AssignedFormat
data.value: ACAD KROVY: Post assigned – {0:0} × {1:0} mm, manual length {2:0} mm.

data.name: Command_Layers_ElementSkippedFormat
data.value: Element skipped while setting its layer: {0}

data.name: Command_Layers_ResultFormat
data.value: ACAD KROVY: elements moved to layers: {0}. Skipped: {1}.

data.name: Command_Settings_ApplyResultFormat
data.value: ACAD KROVY: cutting allowances applied to {0} elements. Skipped: {1}.

data.name: Command_Labels_Shown
data.value: ACAD KROVY: labels on layer KROV_POPIS are visible.

data.name: Command_Labels_Hidden
data.value: ACAD KROVY: labels on layer KROV_POPIS are hidden.

data.name: Command_Labels_LayerMissing
data.value: ACAD KROVY: layer KROV_POPIS does not yet exist in the drawing.

data.name: Warning_LiveRefreshSkippedFormat
data.value: ACAD KROVY: automatic element refresh was skipped: {0}

data.name: Dialog_Edit_WholeNonnegativeFormat
data.value: The “{0}” field must contain a non-negative whole number in millimeters, no greater than {1:0}.

data.name: Dialog_Edit_PositiveNumberFormat
data.value: The “{0}” field must contain a positive number.

data.name: Dialog_Layers_DuplicateFormat
data.value: Layer “{0}” is specified more than once. Each element type must have its own layer.

data.name: Dialog_Settings_RoundingStepFormat
data.value: The fabrication-length rounding increment must be a positive whole number in millimeters, no greater than {0:0}.

data.name: Dialog_Settings_CuttingAllowanceFormat
data.value: {0}: the cutting allowance must be a non-negative number in millimeters, no greater than {1:0}.

data.name: Error_LayerName_Empty
data.value: The layer name must not be empty.

data.name: Error_LayerName_TooLong
data.value: The layer name is too long.

data.name: Error_LayerName_InvalidCharacter
data.value: The layer name contains an invalid character.

data.name: EditWindow_SlopeDirectionMixedTooltip
data.value: The selected elements have different slope directions. If unchecked, each element retains its original direction.

data.name: EditWindow_CuttingAllowanceMixedTooltip
data.value: The selected elements have different cutting allowances. If unchecked, each element retains its original value.

data.name: EditWindow_DefaultAllowanceTooltip
data.value: Applies the current default allowance for each selected element's type.

data.name: SettingsWindow_Title
data.value: ACAD KROVY – element and layer settings

data.name: SettingsWindow_Description
data.value: Settings are stored for the current Windows account. Layers determine where elements are placed in the drawing. Default allowances can be saved for new elements only or applied to existing drawing elements as well.

data.name: SettingsWindow_Manufacturing_Description
data.value: The default cutting allowance is used when an element is newly assigned. When saving, you can choose whether to apply it to existing elements as well.

data.name: SettingsWindow_Language_Description
data.value: Select the user interface language. The change is applied after the settings are saved.

data.name: CommandUi_Rafter_Tooltip
data.value: Assigns the Rafter type to selected lines.

data.name: CommandUi_WallPlate_Tooltip
data.value: Assigns the Wall plate type to selected lines.

data.name: CommandUi_Purlin_Tooltip
data.value: Assigns the Purlin type to selected lines.

data.name: CommandUi_Post_Tooltip
data.value: Assigns the Post type to selected lines.

data.name: CommandUi_CollarTie_Tooltip
data.value: Assigns the Collar tie type to selected lines.

data.name: CommandUi_Brace_Tooltip
data.value: Assigns the Brace type to selected lines.

data.name: CommandUi_TieBeam_Tooltip
data.value: Assigns the Tie beam type to selected lines.

data.name: CommandUi_Assign_Tooltip
data.value: Assigns data to selected lines or polylines.

data.name: CommandUi_Edit_Tooltip
data.value: Batch-edits the checked values of selected elements.

data.name: CommandUi_Inspect_Tooltip
data.value: Displays the data of one ACAD KROVY element.

data.name: CommandUi_Recalc_Tooltip
data.value: Checks the calculations of all elements in the drawing.

data.name: CommandUi_Report_Tooltip
data.value: Inserts a timber schedule for the currently selected elements.

data.name: CommandUi_ReportAll_Tooltip
data.value: Inserts a timber schedule for all ACAD KROVY elements in the drawing.

data.name: CommandUi_Settings_Tooltip
data.value: Configures layer names and colors for each roof-framing element type.

data.name: CommandUi_Labels_Tooltip
data.value: Creates or refreshes automatic labels for all roof-framing elements.

data.name: CommandUi_Toolbar_Tooltip
data.value: Displays or hides the classic floating toolbar with small icons.

data.name: Error_UnsupportedTimberGeometry
data.value: Only LINE and LWPOLYLINE objects are supported.

data.name: Error_LabelUnsupportedEntityType
data.value: Labels can only be created for LINE or LWPOLYLINE objects.

data.name: Error_XDataTooLargeFormat
data.value: The ACAD KROVY element data is too large for the portable XData format ({0} B).

data.name: Error_SlopeAnnotationUnsupportedEntityType
data.value: Slope annotations can only be created for LINE or LWPOLYLINE objects.

data.name: Error_InvalidSlopeDegrees
data.value: The slope must be between 0° and 89.9°.
